pi_items.source: setup_azure_devops.ps1 lines 130-138 explicitly create project named 'TailwindTraders'; work_items.json all items reference 'TailwindTraders' in areaPath field

work_items.json (lines 1-156) contains 15 seeded work items; no work item with title 'Implement Login' exists. Titles present are: 'Implement product inventory search', 'Add real-time stock level notifications', 'Create supplier management module', 'Implement barcode scanning', 'Design REST API rate limiting', 'Product price calculation returns incorrect values', 'API returns 500 error', 'Inventory count becomes negative', 'Dashboard chart renders blank', 'Set up PostgreSQL database migration scripts', 'Configure CI/CD pipeline', 'Write integration tests', 'Build product import/export functionality', 'Add multi-warehouse support', 'Implement Redis caching layer'

pi_items.verified_value: Agile system process exists and supports inherited process creation
pi_items.source: Microsoft Learn documentation confirms Agile is a standard system process template in Azure DevOps (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/organizations/settings/work/inheritance-process-model); task.json description lines 3-4 specify creating inherited process based on 'Agile' system process

pi_items.verified_value: Process rules with state-change conditions and make-required actions are supported
pi_items.source: Microsoft Learn rule-samples documentation shows exact capability: 'Require a field value upon State changes' with example of Remaining Work required when State='Active'; documentation also shows 'Clear the value of a field upon close State' demonstrating State='Closed' triggers. Story Points is a standard field in Agile process User Stories (https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/devops/organizations/settings/work/rule-samples)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires working with the Azure DevOps TailwindTraders project to enforce a process quality rule. The Agile system process in Azure DevOps is a real, standard process that supports inherited process creation and custom rules. Process rules can be configured to trigger when a work item state changes to a specific value (e.g., 'Closed') and can make fields required based on those conditions. Story Points is a standard field available for User Story work items in the Agile process. CRITICAL: The work item titled 'Implement Login' specified in the task metadata does not exist in the seed data. The seeded work items include inventory search, stock notifications, supplier management, barcode scanning, API authentication, pricing, and various infrastructure tasks, but no login-related work item.
